summary: A cable-news clip from Newsmax's 'Rob Schmitt Tonight' in which the host and ICE Acting Director Todd Lyons discuss the arrest of a Des Moines school superintendent who was an illegal alien with a deportation order and criminal history. It is a rebroadcast interview segment with a mugshot graphic, not produced entertainment content.
notable_text: Chyrons: 'ICE ARRESTS DES MOINES SCHOOL SUPERINTENDENT', 'DES MOINES HIRED AN ILLEGAL AS SCHOOL SUPERINTENDENT'; 'ROB SCHMITT TONIGHT'; 'NEWSMAX / Todd Lyons Acting ICE Director'.
